mapper.insert: INSERT INTO db_agent.release (id, title, design_doc_path, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{designDocPath}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, design_doc_path, status, created_at::text AS created_at, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM db_agent.release WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, design_doc_path, status, created_at::text AS created_at, updated_at::text AS updated_at FROM db_agent.release ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 200
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO db_agent.release_script (release_id, file_name, sql_content, status, review_comment, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{releaseId}, #{fileName}, #{sqlContent}, #{status}, #{reviewComment}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, release_id, file_name, sql_content, status, review_comment, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM db_agent.release_script WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, release_id, file_name, sql_content, status, review_comment, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM db_agent.release_script WHERE release_id = #{releaseId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO db_agent.deployment (release_id, environment, status, log, started_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{releaseId}, #{environment}, #{status}, #{log}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, release_id, environment, status, log, started_at, finished_at FROM db_agent.deployment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, release_id, environment, status, log, started_at, finished_at FROM db_agent.deployment WHERE release_id = #{releaseId} ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 50
